name: Frontier LLM-based agents can overcome the ontology curation bottleneck for natural phenotypes
summary: arXiv:2605.28965v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Linking free-text phenotype descriptions to ontology terms, typically referred to as phenotype annotation, is essential for the cross-study integ...
description: arXiv:2605.28965v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Linking free-text phenotype descriptions to ontology terms, typically referred to as phenotype annotation, is essential for the cross-study integration of comparative morphological data. This labor intensive process has heavily relied on highly trained human experts, which makes it challenging to scale and thus a key bottleneck. Dahdul et al....
author: James P. Balhoff, Hilmar Lapp
